mapper.insert: INSERT INTO WORKPLACE_MEMBERS (WORKPLACE_ID, USER_ID, ROLE, HOURLY_WAGE, MEMO, RECEIVE_ATTENDANCE_PUSH, STATUS) VALUES (#{workplaceId}, #{userId}, #{role}, #{hourlyWage}, #{memo}, #{receiveAttendancePush}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT ID, WORKPLACE_ID, USER_ID, ROLE, HOURLY_WAGE, MEMO, RECEIVE_ATTENDANCE_PUSH, STATUS FROM WORKPLACE_MEMBERS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND STATUS = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY ID ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT WM.WORKPLACE_ID, W.NAME AS WORKPLACE_NAME, W.IS_PERSONAL, WM.RECEIVE_ATTENDANCE_PUSH FROM WORKPLACE_MEMBERS WM INNER JOIN WORKPLACES W ON W.ID = WM.WORKPLACE_ID WHERE WM.USER_ID = #{userId} AND WM.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY WM.ID ASC

SELECT WM.ID AS memberId, WM.USER_ID AS userId, U.NAME AS name, U.PROFILE_COLOR AS profileColor, WM.ROLE AS role, WM.HOURLY_WAGE AS hourlyWage, WM.STATUS AS status, WM.MEMO AS memo FROM WORKPLACE_MEMBERS WM INNER JOIN USERS U ON U.ID = WM.USER_ID WHERE WM.WORKPLACE_ID = #{workplaceId} AND WM.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' AND WM.ROLE <> 'OWNER' ORDER BY U.NAME ASC, WM.ID ASC
